name: Abacus Storage King
analysis: It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.4100, stop A$1.3118, target A$1.5600 (1.53:1) — then trail it.
